ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., North Cape, Rangaunu Harbour) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the region */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "district_health_boards" (
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DHB */,
  "dhb_name" TEXT /* Name of the DHB (e.g., Northland) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the DHB */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the DHB */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the DHB */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the DHB's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dhb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity (e.g., Maori, Pacific Peoples) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ethnicity */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken by the ethnicity */,
  "cultural_group" TEXT /* Cultural group to which the ethnicity belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DHB */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ethnicity */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "at_least_partially_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of people who are at least partially vaccinated */,
  "fully_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of people who are fully vaccinated */,
  "partially_vaccinated_uptake" REAL /* Uptake rate of partially vaccinated individuals */,
  "fully_vaccinated_uptake" REAL /* Uptake rate of fully vaccinated individuals */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination data was recorded */,
  "boosted_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Number of people who have received booster shots */,
  "boosted_vaccinations_uptake" REAL /* Uptake rate of booster vaccinations */,
  "first_dose_date" TEXT /* Date when the first dose was administered */,
  "second_dose_date" TEXT /* Date when the second dose was administered */,
  "booster_dose_date" TEXT /* Date when the booster dose was administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_dhb_id FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_id") REFERENCES district_health_boards ("dhb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vaccination record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vaccination_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccination_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., health official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_vaccination_data, download_vaccination_data) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_status" (
  "vaccination_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination status */,
  "vaccination_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination status (e.g., at_least_partially_vaccinated, fully_vaccinated) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the vaccination status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DHB */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the population data was recorded */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Number of males in the population */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Number of females in the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_dhb_id FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_id") REFERENCES district_health_boards ("dhb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uptake_rates" (
  "uptake_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each uptake rate record */,
  "vaccination_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination status */,
  "uptake_rate" REAL /* Uptake rate for the vaccination status */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the uptake rate was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uptake_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uptake_rates_vaccination_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccination_status_id") REFERENCES vaccination_status ("vaccination_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "-SA1_2018" (
  "SA1_2018_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SA1 2018 boundary */,
  "SA1_2018_name" TEXT /* Name of the SA1 2018 boundary */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the SA1 2018 boundary */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the SA1 boundary in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the SA1 boundary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("SA1_2018_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "SA2_2018" (
  "SA2_2018_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SA2 2018 boundary */,
  "SA2_2018_name" TEXT /* Name of the SA2 2018 boundary */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the SA2 2018 boundary */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the SA2 boundary in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the SA2 boundary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("SA2_2018_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meshblock_2018" (
  "meshblock_2018_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meshblock 2018 boundary */,
  "meshblock_2018_name" TEXT /* Name of the meshblock 2018 boundary */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the meshblock 2018 boundary */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the meshblock boundary in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the meshblock boundary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meshblock_2018_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "TA_2018" (
  "TA_2018_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TA 2018 boundary */,
  "TA_2018_name" TEXT /* Name of the TA 2018 boundary */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the TA 2018 boundary */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the TA boundary in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the TA boundary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("TA_2018_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "area_unit_2018" (
  "area_unit_2018_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area unit 2018 boundary */,
  "area_unit_2018_name" TEXT /* Name of the area unit 2018 boundary */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the area unit 2018 boundary */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the area unit boundary in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area unit boundary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_unit_2018_id")
)
